quota-phrased friction check — superseded in 0.4.0 by the name-and-grade valve ('named, graded sound' is a legitimate outcome)

stalePhrases.pattern: too comfortable and challenge it now
stalePhrases.reason: pre-valve friction-check wording (mandatory dissent without the provenance valve) — superseded in 0.4.0

single-axis claim taxonomy — superseded in 0.4.1 by two-axis marking (origin × standing; user-relayed ≠ user-owned; pass-2 F1)

stalePhrases.reason: unconditional complete-on-advance — superseded in 0.4.1 by earned statuses (complete / incomplete (advanced by user) / complete (on stale inputs); pass-2 F5)
